message:
chore: remove deprecated collect/repro_bug.rs debugging leftover

Remove the deprecated repro_bug.rs file that contained only two
comment lines marking it as a debugging session leftover scheduled
for deletion. Completes the cleanup tracked by bead bd-19kr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +0,0 @@
-// This file is deprecated and scheduled for deletion.
-// It was left over from a debugging session.
\ No newline at end of file
